sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80733" key="pentasta/thros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεντα-στάτηρος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[στᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n80733.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">five</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στατῆρες</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in weight</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0503.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sosicr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl> codd. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
